# Rentline Sandbox

Real estate investment simulation game engine. Turn-based multiplayer — players compete over tokenised properties using simulated tUSDC with mortgages, Fed rate cycles, and macro events.

## MCP server

```
npx rentline-sandbox
```

Exposes 17 tools via stdio JSON-RPC.

## Setup

```
npx rentline-sandbox setup
```

## Tools

- list_games — list open game rooms
- get_game — full game state
- create_game — create a game with mortgage/Fed config
- join_game — join via invite code
- mark_ready — toggle ready state
- advance_turn — host: run all 7 engine phases
- get_feed — turn event stream (Fed, macro, rent, price moves, debt service)
- list_properties — active property pool
- get_fed_history — FOMC decision log
- buy_tokens — all-cash token purchase
- sell_tokens — sell tokens
- originate_mortgage — leveraged acquisition (LTV-limited)
- refi_mortgage — rate-and-term or cash-out refi
- heloc_draw — home equity line of credit
- heloc_repay — repay HELOC balance
- get_debt — debt summary: balances, LTV, arrears
- get_portfolio — NAV, P&L, leverage ratio, holdings
- get_leaderboard — in-game or global leaderboard

## CLI

```
sandbox auth login --key <key>
sandbox game list | create | join | advance | feed | leaderboard | fed
sandbox trade buy | sell
sandbox portfolio <game-id> <player-id>
sandbox mortgage buy | refi | heloc | repay | list
sandbox admin properties list | sync
sandbox admin mint
```

## Docs

https://github.com/your-org/rentline-sandbox
